languages.text: {n}Вскоре на Зарков высадились первые силы Адептус Механикус, и сложнейшая машинерия начала оживать под бинарные молитвы. Генеторы под предводительством магоса под мрачным взглядом меровцев начали готовиться к исследованиям.{/n}

{n}The first Adeptus Mechanicus forces soon made planetfall on Zarkov, and their complex machinery was roused to wakefulness by the chanting of binharic prayers. Under the hard eyes of the Merovians, the Magos-led Genetors began preparations for their investigation.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вскоре на Зарков высадились первые силы Адептус Механикус, и сложнейшая машинерия начала оживать под бинарные молитвы. Генеторы под предводительством магоса под мрачным взглядом меровцев начали готовиться к исследованиям.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The first Adeptus Mechanicus forces soon made planetfall on Zarkov, and their complex machinery was roused to wakefulness by the chanting of binharic prayers. Under the hard eyes of the Merovians, the Magos-led Genetors began preparations for their investigation.{/n}

{n}The first Adeptus Mechanicus forces soon made planetfall on Zarkov, and their complex machinery was roused to wakefulness by the chanting of binharic prayers. Under the hard eyes of the Merovians, the Magos-led Genetors began preparations for their investigation.{/n}

{n}The first Adeptus Mechanicus forces soon made planetfall on Zarkov, and their complex machinery was roused to wakefulness by the chanting of binharic prayers. Under the hard eyes of the Merovians, the Magos-led Genetors began preparations for their investigation.{/n}

languages.text: {n}最初の機械神殿の軍勢はすぐにザルコフに降り立った。彼らの複雑な機械は、ビナリックの祈りの唱えによって目覚めた。メロヴィアンの厳しい視線の下、マゴス率いる遺伝子操作者たちは調査の準備を始めた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The first Adeptus Mechanicus forces soon made planetfall on Zarkov, and their complex machinery was roused to wakefulness by the chanting of binharic prayers. Under the hard eyes of the Merovians, the Magos-led Genetors began preparations for their investigation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}最初の機械神殿の軍勢はすぐにザルコフに降り立った。彼らの複雑な機械は、ビナリックの祈りの唱えによって目覚めた。メロヴィアンの厳しい視線の下、マゴス率いる遺伝子操作者たちは調査の準備を始めた。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Las primeras fuerzas del Adeptus Mechanicus no tardaron en aterrizar en Zarkov, y sus cánticos binarios despertaron a la compleja maquinaria que llevaron con ellas. Bajo la mirada dura de los merovianos, los Genetores y su líder magos comenzaron los preparativos para su investigación.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The first Adeptus Mechanicus forces soon made planetfall on Zarkov, and their complex machinery was roused to wakefulness by the chanting of binharic prayers. Under the hard eyes of the Merovians, the Magos-led Genetors began preparations for their investigation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Las primeras fuerzas del Adeptus Mechanicus no tardaron en aterrizar en Zarkov, y sus cánticos binarios despertaron a la compleja maquinaria que llevaron con ellas. Bajo la mirada dura de los merovianos, los Genetores y su líder magos comenzaron los preparativos para su investigación.{/n}

languages.text: {n}首批机械修会的部队很快降落在扎尔科夫，复杂的机械装置在二进制祷文的吟诵中苏醒。在梅罗夫人冷峻的注视下，贤者率领的基因士们开始了调查准备。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The first Adeptus Mechanicus forces soon made planetfall on Zarkov, and their complex machinery was roused to wakefulness by the chanting of binharic prayers. Under the hard eyes of the Merovians, the Magos-led Genetors began preparations for their investigation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}首批机械修会的部队很快降落在扎尔科夫，复杂的机械装置在二进制祷文的吟诵中苏醒。在梅罗夫人冷峻的注视下，贤者率领的基因士们开始了调查准备。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die ersten Einheiten des Adeptus Mechanicus trafen wenig später auf Zarkov ein, und ihre komplexe Maschinerie wurde durch den Gesang ihrer binhärischen Gebete in Wachsamkeit versetzt. Unter den strengen Augen der Merovianer trafen die Genetoren unter der Leitung der Magi Vorbereitungen für ihre Untersuchung.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The first Adeptus Mechanicus forces soon made planetfall on Zarkov, and their complex machinery was roused to wakefulness by the chanting of binharic prayers. Under the hard eyes of the Merovians, the Magos-led Genetors began preparations for their investigation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die ersten Einheiten des Adeptus Mechanicus trafen wenig später auf Zarkov ein, und ihre komplexe Maschinerie wurde durch den Gesang ihrer binhärischen Gebete in Wachsamkeit versetzt. Unter den strengen Augen der Merovianer trafen die Genetoren unter der Leitung der Magi Vorbereitungen für ihre Untersuchung.{/n}

languages.text: {n}İlk Adeptus Mechanicus kuvvetleri kısa süre sonra Zarkov'a indi ve karmaşık makineleri, ikilidildeki duaların ilahileriyle uyandırıldı. Magos liderliğindeki Genetörler, Merovluların sert bakışları altında inceleme hazırlıklarına başladı.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The first Adeptus Mechanicus forces soon made planetfall on Zarkov, and their complex machinery was roused to wakefulness by the chanting of binharic prayers. Under the hard eyes of the Merovians, the Magos-led Genetors began preparations for their investigation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}İlk Adeptus Mechanicus kuvvetleri kısa süre sonra Zarkov'a indi ve karmaşık makineleri, ikilidildeki duaların ilahileriyle uyandırıldı. Magos liderliğindeki Genetörler, Merovluların sert bakışları altında inceleme hazırlıklarına başladı.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les premières troupes de l'Adeptus Mechanicus débarquèrent bientôt sur Zarkov, leurs machineries complexes s'éveillant au rythme des psalmodies binhaires. Toisés par les regards durs des Meroviens, les genetors entamèrent les préparatifs de leur enquête sous la houlette du magos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The first Adeptus Mechanicus forces soon made planetfall on Zarkov, and their complex machinery was roused to wakefulness by the chanting of binharic prayers. Under the hard eyes of the Merovians, the Magos-led Genetors began preparations for their investigation.{/n}

Toisés par les regards durs des Meroviens, les genetors entamèrent les préparatifs de leur enquête sous la houlette du magos.{/n}
